comments.LineComment: | GD&T geometric characteristic symbols per ASME Y14.5 / ISO 1101.
| The 14 geometric characteristics organized by category:
| - **Profile**: Profile of Line, Profile of Surface

value.value: Controls straightness of a line element or axis
Controls true position relative to datums
Controls symmetry about a datum plane
Controls circular elements relative to datum axis
Controls entire surface relative to datum axis
